1 100 Lincoln Rd #833 Miami Beach FL 33139
Experience South Beach living in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom condo at The Decoplage, featuring stunning ocean views from every room. This elegant residence boasts tile floors, impact-resistant windows and balcony doors, an open kitchen with granite countertops, and full storage. Located on the beach promenade and steps from Lincoln Road Mall, The Decoplage offers resort-style amenities, including a heated pool, fitness center, recreation room, 24-hour security, and valet parking. This unit boasts a well-designed floor plan with a comfortable living space, perfect for relaxation and entertaining. Resort-Style Amenities: gym, pool, hot tub, and tennis courts. Experience the pinnacle of luxury living in this exquisite 1 Bed + Den, 1 Bath fully furnished apartment at the prestigious Hyde Suites & Residences. With soaring high ceilings and premium finishes throughout, this home features a spacious open-concept eat-in kitchen and a private terrace for ultimate relaxation. Indulge in world-class amenities, including a tennis court, state-of-the-art fitness center with a spinning studio, a rejuvenating spa offering massage services, and a steam room with showers. Additional conveniences include a business center, media room, kids' play area, and mini-golf. Ideally situated in one of the city's most sought-after locations, you're just steps away from top shopping and dining destinations like Trader Joe's, Target, Palm Court, and the Design District. Landing's apartments at Address East End are designed for comfortable, easy living, with the ability to stay as long as you like. Experience living with Landing Every apartment is outfitted with all the modern essentials including: custom-designed furnishings, a fully-equipped kitchen with deluxe stainless steel appliances, a gourmet coffee maker, premium linens, Smart TVs, and incredibly fast, reliable internet for working from home. When you live with Landing, you'll enjoy a hassle-free experience with the added benefit of 24/7 access to our dedicated member experience team. Landing's apartments at Address East End are designed for comfortable, easy living, with the ability to stay as long as you like. Experience living with Landing Every apartment is outfitted with all the modern essentials including: custom-designed furnishings, a fully-equipped kitchen with deluxe stainless steel appliances, a gourmet coffee maker, premium linens, Smart TVs, and incredibly fast, reliable internet for working from home. When you live with Landing, you'll enjoy a hassle-free experience with the added benefit of 24/7 access to our dedicated member experience team. 141 2600 S Sepulveda Blvd unit Unit 306 Los Angeles CA 90064
Green Park is a six-story, 53-unit luxury apartment building located at the corner of Sepulveda Boulevard and Richland Avenue. Ideally positioned for commuters and students alike, the building is just seconds from the Culver City bus line to UCLA and a short five-minute walk to the Expo Line, which offers direct access to USC and Santa Monica College. Each apartment features a contemporary design with efficient layouts and comes with high-speed internet of 1000mbps with equally fast upload and download speeds. The building's spacious, furnished lobby offers a comfortable setting to relax or work remotely, while the adjacent mirrored fitness center includes an outdoor workout area. On the top floor, residents can enjoy a beautifully furnished recreation room complete with a kitchen, bathroom, and expansive wraparound deck offering sweeping views. In addition, two fully furnished rooftop decks provide panoramic vistas of downtown Los Angeles and the Pacific Ocean, perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying the sunset. 161205 CLAW LOVELY 4 4 $5395 10

181 2855 Arapahoe St unit 1-1103 Denver CO 80205
Experience the best of Denver living at CURTIS PARK REDEVELOPMENT. Conveniently located in the heart of the city, this apartment complex offers a range of amenities designed to enhance your lifestyle. Stay active with our on-site fitness center or enjoy some outdoor fun at the playground. Each apartment comes equipped with a washer and dryer, saving you time and trips to the laundromat. Parking is never a hassle with our dedicated spaces, and with RTD Transit nearby, commuting around Denver is a breeze. The beautiful Curtis Park is just a stone's throw away, perfect for picnics, walks, or simply enjoying the outdoors. Our professional groundskeeping and landscaping services ensure that the complex always looks its best. Choose CURTIS PARK REDEVELOPMENT for a comfortable, convenient, and vibrant living experience in Denver, CO. 161619 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 2 2 $2150 10
182 2855 Arapahoe St unit 24-25101 Denver CO 80205
Experience the best of Denver living at CURTIS PARK REDEVELOPMENT. Conveniently located in the heart of the city, this apartment complex offers a range of amenities designed to enhance your lifestyle. Stay active with our on-site fitness center or enjoy some outdoor fun at the playground. Each apartment comes equipped with a washer and dryer, saving you time and trips to the laundromat. Parking is never a hassle with our dedicated spaces, and with RTD Transit nearby, commuting around Denver is a breeze. The beautiful Curtis Park is just a stone's throw away, perfect for picnics, walks, or simply enjoying the outdoors. Our professional groundskeeping and landscaping services ensure that the complex always looks its best. 191 2901 Boston Ave unit D-15 Des Moines IA 50310
Welcome to Clover Creek! Experience contemporary comfort and convenience in our serene neighborhood at Clover Creek Our pet-friendly community provides a variety of spacious Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom units tailored to suit your lifestyle. Apartment Features & Amenities: - Enjoy the luxury of private patios or balconies (availability varies by floor). - Benefit from complimentary parking for your convenience. - Garages are also available for added convenience! - We're a pet-friendly community, welcoming up to 2 pets per unit with a one-time non-refundable pet fee plus a monthly pet rent of per pet. Screening Criteria: - Ensure that your household gross monthly income is 2.5 times the base rent. - Maintain a minimum credit score of 525. - No collections (excluding student loans and medical payments). - Uphold a clean criminal history and rental record. - Provide a valid US ID or SSN, or have a cosigner with a valid US ID or SSN. Utility Policies: - Common area utilities (electric, water, sewer, and trash) are arranged by the landlord. Apply today and immerse yourself in the perfect blend of modern living and tranquility at Clover Creek. Your new home is waiting! *Income Restricted 161682 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $685 10

201 3003 Transport St SE unit 025-D Albuquerque NM 87106
Our Newly Renovated, Gated Luxury Homes have Full bathrooms in every room, Bedrooms, Extra Rooms and Offices! Even though you will love cooking in our spacious kitchen on our all-Chrome appliances, it's our Outdoor Grilling station at the Clubhouse you will want to use every chance you get! Our Outdoor Clubhouse area is open 10am-10pm and features a sparkling, uniquely designed, 2 tier Olympic Size Pool, Hot Tub, Volleyball Court and a Two Grill Deluxe BBQ grilling station with chairs! Our Main Clubhouse is open 24/7 and , business center with private rooms, free WiFi and printing and a 2-story gym with sauna, steam room and tanning beds. We didn't forget our pets; we have several great Pet Parks and Pet Washing areas for them. We have the latest in the Self-Serve Ice and Water Mill, no more puddles on your floorboard from melting ice! Diamond Estates Luxury Homes already Welcomed You Home, your keys are ready! COMING SOON: Basketball Court, Playground areas and a Sprinkler Water Park to cool off! We didn't forget our pets; we have several great Pet Parks and Pet Washing areas for them. We have the latest in the Self-Serve Ice and Water Mill, no more puddles on your floorboard from melting ice! Diamond Estates Luxury Homes already Welcomed You Home, your keys are ready! COMING SOON: Basketball Court, Playground areas and a Sprinkler Water Park to cool off! 252 60 SW 13th St #2413 Miami FL 33130
Nestled just a block from Brickell's vibrant heart, this charming, well managed building offers the perfect location with amazing amenities. Walkable to Brickell's best restaurants and shops, this building is a quaint haven with 24-hour security. The 1-bed, 1.5 bath 2-story duplex boasts mesmerizing city and water views from both upstairs and downstairs balconies. Indulge in the convenient lobby cafe's delicious offerings. 1 parking spot included plus valet services available. This meticulously well kept residence harmonizes location, amenities, and charm. 130130 RentPath LISTHUB 1 2 $2800 10

261 601 S Mesa Hills Dr unit Apt. 0612 - The Mesa Verde El Paso TX 79912
The Preserve at Mesa Hills is located on the West side of El Paso, Texas near UTEP. The community is surrounded by high end shops, entertainment, and restaurants for a good time with friends and family. Enjoy coming home to our beautiful community with gorgeous Franklin Mountain views, tall, pine trees and gorgeous, green grass surround our one, and two bedroom apartments. We have 6 different spacious floor plans with black or stainless steel appliances, walk in closets, balconies, washer/dryers and fireplaces, that will fit exactly what you are looking for. Our spacious one and two bedroom apartment and town-home's include washer and dryer hookups, black on black appliances, faux wood floors, updated lighting and plumbing fixtures, fireplaces, spacious closets, and so much more! Our community extends an array of amenities from our sparkling swimming pool, 24 hour fitness center, business center, playground, picnic area with BBQ grills, covered parking, and Pet Park. Indian Springs is conveniently located minutes away from bus transportation and easy access to I-10 freeway. 165581 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 2 2 $1235 10

271 6034 National Blvd #522 Ave Maria FL 34142
A beautifully designed 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo located in the prestigious National Golf & Country Club at Ave Maria. This move-in-ready home offers the perfect blend of comfort, modern living, and resort-style amenities in one of Southwest Florida's most desirable communities. Step inside to a bright, open-concept floor plan featuring a modern kitchen with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and ample cabinet space. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the dining and living areas, creating a spacious and inviting atmosphere for entertaining or relaxing. Enjoy your morning coffee or evening sunset from the screened-in lanai, offering peaceful views of lake, golf course and preserve and fresh Florida breezes. Also enjoy covered parking, easy elevator access in unit washer and dryer. The primary suite includes a walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom, while the second bedroom and full bath are perfect for guests. As a resident, you'll enjoy bundled golf membership and access to exceptional amenities including a championship golf course, resort-style pool, clubhouse, fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, and spa services, all within minutes of Ave Maria's charming town center with dining, shopping, and more. 130812 RentPath LISTHUB 2 2 $5795 10
272 6034 National Blvd #523 Ave Maria FL 34142
Welcome to your vacation oasis at The National Golf and Country Club in the charming town of Ave Maria, Florida! Step into this beautiful Birkdale-style unit, perfectly positioned to overlook a peaceful nature preserve, a pristine golf course, and a sparkling lake. Mornings on the lanai? Absolute perfection--coffee has never tasted better. Golf lovers, you're in for a treat! Enjoy exclusive access to the prestigious Gordon Lewis-designed course, with transfer of golf as an option. That's just the beginning... The National also features a stunning resort-style pool with a Tiki bar, a brand-new clubhouse with an incredible restaurant and bar, plus pickleball, tennis, bocce ball, a full gym, fitness studio, day spa--you name it. This is the year to treat yourself. Ave Maria ~ Once you get here, you "get it." 130812 RentPath LISTHUB 2 2 $5795 10
273 6034 National Blvd #533 Ave Maria FL 34142
Live the resort lifestyle in this stunning fully furnished, turnkey 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom Birkdale condo on the 3rd floor, offering breathtaking views of the lake, lush preserve, and the 14th hole of the Gordon Lewis-designed championship golf course. With a full golf membership included, this unit is the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and leisure. Inside, the smart split-bedroom layout ensures privacy for guests while keeping the main living spaces bright and connected. The spacious primary suite features dual closets and tranquil views, creating a peaceful retreat. The modern chef's kitchen is a true standout, with a large center island, luxurious quartz countertops, and seamless flow into the open-concept living and dining areas--ideal for entertaining or simply unwinding with a view. Elevator access and assigned covered parking add comfort and ease, and the unit comes fully equipped with all appliances, making it truly move-in ready. Situated within the gates of The National Golf & Country Club, residents enjoy access to a championship 18-hole golf course, a resort-style zero-entry pool with lap lanes, a poolside bar and grill, Har-Tru tennis courts, pickleball, bocce ball, a state-of-the-art fitness center, relaxing sauna, indulgent day spa, and a brand new clubhouse offering both casual and fine dining, indoors and out. Beyond the gates, the vibrant town of Ave Maria offers even more to explore, from charming parks and a fun-filled water park to unique dining, boutique shopping, and regular community events at the Town Center. Whether you're looking for a seasonal retreat or a year-round residence, this exceptional condo offers the ultimate in comfort, luxury, and leisure. 291 700 NE 24th St #4504 Miami FL 33137
Luxury condo on the 45th floor of Aria Reserve with breathtaking panoramic views of Biscayne Bay! This never-lived-in 1 Bedroom + Den, 2-bath residence features elegant modern design, expansive living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that showcase stunning city and bay vistas. The unit is upgraded with glass shower enclosures, LED-lit mirrors in all bathrooms, and designer curtains in the primary bedroom and living space. Located in a premier waterfront tower, Aria Reserve offers unmatched resort-style amenities: private sports marina, spa, tennis, paddleball, squash and basketball courts, mini golf, a dog park, and two pools with water views--including a semi-Olympic pool. Experience elevated living in Miami's most iconic high-rise. 166322 RentPath LISTHUB 1 2 $7000 10
292 700 NE 24th St #4604 Miami FL 33137
This brand new luxury condo has panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, all the way from Key Biscayne to Fort Lauderdale and the ocean beyond. The 1 bedroom, 2 full bath with den features high end appliances, floor to ceiling sliding glass doors, upgraded fixtures, glass showers and backlit mirrors in all bathrooms, a walk-in closet, new shelving, and automatic shades that include blackout shades in the master bedroom. Building amenities include a gym, multiple pools, a spa, yoga studio, a basketball court, tennis courts, movie theater, game room, kids playroom and outdoor grilling areas. The property is located in Edgewater and is just minutes away from Midtown, Wynwood, Miami Beach and Miami International Airport. Take the opportunity to live in Miami's newest waterfront condo. 166322 RentPath LISTHUB 1 2 $7000 10

377 122 Greenwich Ave unit 103 Goshen NY 10924
Welcome to The Legacy Apartments, Goshen's premier new luxury rental community. The building owner is offering first month complimentary for the holidays. These brand-new 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom units are designed for modern living, featuring spacious open floor plans, gourmet kitchens with gas stove tops and white quartz countertops, in-unit washer/dryers, sleek finishes, and abundant natural light. Only 4 units per floor offer a boutique, private living experience. Building amenities include elevator access, a secure intercom entry system, covered parking, and a rooftop terrace with sweeping views. Enjoy the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience. Located in the heart of Goshen, just 10 minutes from Garnet Health Medical Center and minutes from LEGOLAND New York. Exceptional commuter access with close proximity to I-84, I-87, and Route 17, plus public transportation options nearby. Walkable to local shops, dining, and village amenities.Rental Terms:- One month security depositExperience luxury living in one of Orange County's most connected and desirable locations. 156817 ONEKEY LOVELY 2 2 $2900 9

422 1502 W Ajo Wy unit 202 Tucson AZ 85713
At Ajo Properties, we are proud to bring fresh management and a renewed vision to three unique apartment communities in Tucson: Westlake (Buenas at 1502) - 100 units Riverview (Buenas at 1310) - 80 units Santa Cruz (Buenas at 1240) - 44 units Together, our communities offer 224 apartment homes designed for comfort and convenience. We are committed to creating safe, clean, and welcoming living environments for all our residents. As new management, we are actively working to enhance our properties through repairs, renovations, and upgraded amenities. This includes preparing laundry facilities, addressing community needs, and reopening our pools next year. Our mission is to restore these communities to their fullest potential while providing our residents with attentive service and a place they're proud to call home. Come grow with us -- exciting improvements are on the way! 158104 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $640 9

440 1550 University Woods Pl unit 01 - 1510 Tampa FL 33612
Welcome to Palm Flats, a newly renovated apartment community located in the heart of Tampa, FL. We offer brand-new, renovated two bedroom apartments and townhomes featuring two master size bedrooms with large walk-in closets; in-unit washer and dryer, stainless steel appliances and high-end finishes throughout each apartment. Enjoy outstanding community amenities like our swimming pool and fully-equipped fitness center. Conveniently located near USF, Tampa Palms, and plenty more just minutes away your commute to work or school will be a breeze. Give us a call or stop by our on-site leasing office to see for yourself. We can't wait to welcome you to your new home at Palm Flats! 158312 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 2 2 $1449 9

Welcome to Park North Apartments, located in the vibrant city of Houston, TX. Our gated community offers residents a variety of amenities to enhance their lifestyle. Take a dip in our sparkling swimming pool, enjoy outdoor grilling areas for gatherings with friends and family, and let your furry friends run free in our dog park. Stay active in our 24-hour fitness center or practice mindfulness in our yoga studio. Need to get some work done? Visit our business center for all your professional needs. Our bi-lingual staff is here to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. With 24-hour emergency maintenance, you can rest easy knowing we are here for you. Experience the convenience and comfort of Park North Apartments. 158501 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $899 9

476 1756 S Clyde Morris Blvd unit 105 Daytona Beach FL 32119
SCHEDULE A SHOWING ONLINE AT: showmojo.com/lrt/5096e84065 ---- Find the newly renovated apartment home you've been searching for at Nordica Landing in Daytona Beach! Set on professionally landscaped lawns, our spacious, freshly renovated one and two bedroom apartment homes provide modern comforts in peaceful surroundings. A tropical oasis just moments away from shopping, the beach, and other exciting events, our welcoming community boasts stylish, renovated finishes and amenities that are perfectly suited to fit your active and busy lifestyle. Convenience is key, and Nordica Landing provides easy access to the rest of Daytona ensuring seamless connectivity to Daytona Speedway, Daytona College, Bethune Cookman, and Embry Riddle. Two Bedroom / Two Bathroom Cats OK ($25/month) No restrictions Dogs OK ($25/month) Large dogs welcome No aggressive breeds allowed 158928 SHOWMOJO LOVELY 2 2 $1349 9

Convenience is key, and Nordica Landing provides easy access to the rest of Daytona ensuring seamless connectivity to Daytona Speedway, Daytona College, Bethune Cookman, and Embry Riddle. 539 301 Walkertown Ave unit 101E Winston-Salem NC 27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem. 161941 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $750 9

602 5728 S Blackstone Ave Chicago IL 60637
Beautiful courtyard building in Hyde Park! Steps to University of Chicago campus. Open concept studio featuring hardwood floors and great closet space. On site laundry & bike room, on site manager. Heat included. $70 Application Fee per Person. $500 Move-In Fee Total. Cats welcome, sorry no dogs. Rent Includes Heat 128273 LISTANZA LOVELY 0 1 $1125 9

607 5728 S Blackstone Ave unit 105 Chicago IL 60637
This elegant gated building with wide cobble stone walkway and center manicured floral courtyard arrangement adds a touch of class located in the heart of campus at University of Chicago. This quaint studio has hardwood flooring throughout and ample closet space. The wide kitchen nook is cut out separate from the open floor plan and best of all heat and water are included in the rent. Amenities are on site laundry and bike room for your convenance. You are close to the CTA, MeTra, on campus transportation, walking distance to restaurants, grocery store, general shopping, bike trails, Lake Michigan, Museums and 25 minute ride away from down town Chicago. $75 Application. $500 Move-In Fee. 128273 MRED LOVELY 0 1 $1125 9

620 605 Chase Blvd unit 109 Sun Prairie WI 53590
Elevate your lifestyle amidst Sun Prairie's vibrant ambiance with our exceptional apartment complex, offering 56 thoughtfully designed units just steps away from the picturesque 21-acre Carriage Hills Estates Park. Immerse yourself in convenience with nearby amenities including Pick 'n Save and the bustling dining and shopping scene of downtown Sun Prairie. Discover the epitome of comfort and value with inclusive utilities- water, sewer and gas - and indulge in the luxury of onsite amenities such as a sparkling pool and rejuvenating spa/salon. From cozy studios to expansive two-bedroom residences, we have a space for you! 165611 BUILDIUM LOVELY 0 1 $995 9

LYNN / BOSTON - LOW MOVE IN COSTS!! WHY PAY HIGHER RENT FOR FULL SERVICE BUILDING AMENITIES YOU WILL NEVER USE?! NOW LEASING THE AREAS NEWEST LUXURY DEVELOPMENT! NO BROKER FEE! BRAND NEW FULLY FURNISHED ROOMS - PRIVATE PARKING SPOT AVAILABLE! ALL UTILITIES INCLUDED- HEAT, AIR CONDITIONING , HOT WATER AND ELECTRIC INCLUDED. WIFI READY! NO PETS AND NO SMOKING. BRAND NEW SHARED FULL AND HALF BATHROOMS WITH OVERSIZED FULLY TILED SHOWERS READY FOR USE. NEWLY ADDED COMMON KITCHENS WITH CUSTOM CABINETS AND GRANITE COUNTERTOPS, STAINLESS APPLIANCES WITH MICROWAVES. BEDS , MATTRESSES AND LINENS PROVIDED UPON MOVE IN. FULL LAUNDRY FACILITY WITH FOLDING STATIONS LOCATED ON SITE. AND PRIVATE PARKING SPOT AVAILABLE! Rooms ALSO include brand new refrigerators, plasma TVs and VISUAL touch security. Professionally managed, limited availability. Desirable Lynn Commons location. Steps to Market Basket, Dunkin Donuts and Lynnway. Easy access to Boston and LOGAN AIRPORT via Lynn Station Commuter rail stop. Short distance to Rt 1, and Nahant, Revere and North shore beaches. CONTACT STIVEN AT 781-267-8068 FOR A SHOWING! 166219 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 0 12 $995 9

681 950 Brickell Bay Dr unit 1703 Miami FL 33131
Beautiful 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom residence located in the highly sought after Plaza on Brickell. This bright and spacious unit offers an open floor plan, floor to ceiling windows, and a private balcony with city views. The kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinet space. The Plaza on Brickell is a full-service building with resort-style amenities including two infinity pools, fitness center, spa, club room, business center, and 24-hour concierge and security. Perfectly located in the heart of Brickell, just steps away from shops, fine dining, cafes, and entertainment. Easy to show!! 153118 MARMLS LOVELY 1 1 $3000 9
682 950 Brickell Bay Dr unit 501 Miami FL 33131

This bright, open-concept unit features sleek finishes and floor-to-ceiling windows, perfectly complementing its unbeatable location in the heart of Brickell. 683 1 Grand Park Ln unit 6109 Thomasville GA 31757
THOMASVILLE, GEORGIA'S MOST EXCEPTIONAL APARTMENT COMMUNITY You are invited to be one of the first to call Grand Park Apartments home. We are Thomasville, Georgia's newest and most luxurious apartment community. From the moment you drive onto our manicured grounds to when you step into your new apartment home, you'll recognize this as the lifestyle you deserve. Enjoy our resort-style, sparkling, salt water pool with cabanas, grilling area, fire-pits and quarter-mile walking trail. Grand Park has a second floor deck overlooking our courtyard, a 24-hour fitness center, a custom playground and more. Our one, two and three-bedroom living spaces are appointed with granite countertops, white cabinetry, built in microwaves, walk-in closets, laundry room with washer dryer hook-ups and private balconies and patios. Discover more about our luxury living spaces in our Property Details area. Life at Grand Park places you near award-winning schools and abundant shopping and dining options. Our dedicated, professional and friendly management and maintenance team is responsive to your needs. This is your time and Grand Parks is your place. Enjoy luxury living at Grand Parks. We invite you to schedule your personal tour today. 155284 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $1250 8

691 100 Lincoln Rd #1420 Miami Beach FL 33139
Renovated Jr 1 bed apartment at Decoplage Condo! The apartment features ceramic floor all over, fully equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances, glass shower, walk-in closet. Rent price include valet parking for 1 car, tv cable + Wifi, electricity. The best location is south Beach, close to restaurants, cafes, shops and a few to steps to the beach. Fully equipped building with heated pool, renovated gym, direct ocean access. Rent prices depend on the length of stay and the season. Winter season rates range from $3,500 to $4,200, depending on the length of stay. 3099 RentPath LISTHUB 0 1 $3500 8
692 100 Lincoln Rd unit 100-1427 Miami Beach FL 33139
SCHEDULE A SHOWING ONLINE AT: showmojo.com/lrt/26c432c0b3 ---- Experience oceanfront living at its best in Decoplage Unit 1427, a high-floor studio with unobstructed Atlantic Ocean views. Wake up to endless blue horizons and enjoy direct beach access in one of Miami Beach's most iconic buildings, located at the end of Lincoln Road--steps from world-class dining, shopping, and entertainment. Decoplage offers true resort-style amenities, including an Olympic-size oceanfront pool, fitness center overlooking the ocean, meeting room, children's playroom, and on-site laundry facilities. The building features a beautiful, modern lobby, 24-hour front desk, security, and valet service for comfort and convenience. Unit 1427 delivers the ideal blend of location, lifestyle, and views in the heart of South Beach. Unit is fully furnished. Walk across the street to the iconic Lincoln Road Mall for Shopping, Dining, enjoying Art and Entertainment. 3099 SHOWMOJO LOVELY 0 1 $3500 8

707 1001 S Forest Ave unit 214 Ann Arbor MI 48104
Spacious Two-Bedroom Apartments Just Minutes from Campus! One of our most popular locations--just a five-minute walk to campus! These spacious two-bedroom apartments feature large living rooms, ample closet space, and double-vanity bathrooms, making them perfect for sharing. Select units have been beautifully updated with hardwood floors and chalkboard accent walls, adding both style and functionality. Residents also enjoy the convenience of on-site laundry facilities and included parking. Experience the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and charm--all within steps of campus. 155493 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 2 1 $2425 8

Secure Building with FOB Entry System Close to Carle Hospital and OSF Hospitals Many Restaurants Nearby Some Units Have Balconies Fitness Center with Modern NordicTrack Equipment Retail Space on the First Floor Plank Flooring Throughout Stainless Steel Appliance Package Fully Furnished Unit with Full Sized Beds Washer/Dryer in Each Unit Smart TV in Living Room Tenant pays Electric/Gas A Utility Fee of $55 per bed will be assessed for Internet, Trash, Recycling, Water and UC Sanitary Lease Dates: 8/18/26-7/31/27 (Payments are based on a 12 installment lease) 48723 BUILDIUM LOVELY 2 2 $1975 8

755 1163 Baltic Ave unit 303 Tiffin IA 52340
Welcome to The Baltic, a new construction apartment complex located in the heart of Tiffin, IA. Conveniently situated at the intersection of I-380 & I-80, this property offers easy access to major highways and future bus stops for effortless commuting. The Baltic boasts a variety of floor plans, including studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom options, all featuring luxury vinyl plank flooring, quartz countertops, and stainless steel GE appliances. Each apartment comes with a balcony, perfect for enjoying the outdoors from the comfort of your home. Enjoy the convenience of underground parking and secured building access. The Baltic will also offer the unique feature of commercial businesses on the first floor. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and modern living at The Baltic. 156521 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $1395 8

We feature amenities such as an all-electric kitchen and carpeted floors. You and your furry family can come home to an air-conditioned apartment with ceiling fans during the hot summer days. And our apartment homes are cable ready so that you can entertain your family or friends in your spacious home. The comforts don't end outside your front door! We have great community amenities designed with you in mind. Take advantage of our business center or make a splash in our shimmering swimming pool. 803 15000 Euclid Ave unit 10 East Cleveland OH 44112
SCHEDULE A SHOWING ONLINE AT: showmojo.com/lrt/709906d07b ---- Welcome to your new sanctuary! Situated in a vibrant neighborhood, this charming 2-bedroom unit at 15000 Euclid Ave, Cleveland, OH, 44112 - Unit 10 offers the perfect comfort and convenience. Designed for those seeking a peaceful retreat without sacrificing access to the best the city has to offer, this cozy apartment provides an exceptional living experience. We are accepting section 8 vouchers as well. Property Type: * Multi-Family Dwelling: This property is part of a multi-family property, providing you with a community-oriented living environment with multiple units within the building. Interior Features: * Modern Kitchen: The kitchen is well-appointed with essential cabinetry and workspace, making meal preparation a breeze. Enjoy the convenience of modern fixtures and ample storage space. * Comfortable Bedroom: The bedroom offers a peaceful oasis, perfect for unwinding after a busy day. Its tranquil setting ensures a good night's sleep. * Updated Bathroom: The bathroom is clean and functional, with modern fixtures that cater to your daily needs. * Landscaped Surroundings: The apartment is nestled within a beautifully landscaped area, offering a green and serene environment. The lush greenery around the property adds to the tranquil atmosphere, providing a refreshing retreat from the city's hustle and bustle. * Safe and Secure: The property is situated in a safe neighborhood, providing peace of mind for you and your loved ones. The well-lit exterior and secure entryways further enhance the security of your new home. Location Highlights: * Convenient Access: Situated in a desirable neighborhood, this property provides easy access to local shops, dining, and entertainment options. Whether you're a busy professional or a student, you'll appreciate the convenience of having amenities close by. * Vibrant Community: The surrounding area is known for its friendly community atmosphere and offers plenty of opportunities to explore and engage with your neighbors. Additional Information: * Screening: We charge a $25 fee per person over the age of 18 for background checks. Our comprehensive screening process includes credit, background, and eviction checks as well as verification of income, job history, and landlord references. We strive to approve tenants who may not initially think they qualify. Resident Benefit Package: Our mandatory Resident Benefit Package is designed to make your life easier, rewarding, and stress-free. Here's what you get: Pest Share Protection: Covers control for bed bugs, fleas, mites, ticks, & weevils. Credit Building: Boost your credit score with every rent payment--we report it for you! Resident Rewards: Earn cash and discounts worth up to $4,500 annually. No ACH Fees: Enjoy waived $2.49 ACH fees on all online payments. 24/7 Maintenance Line: Round-the-clock access to ensure peace of mind. NSF Fee Waiver: Get one non-sufficient funds (NSF) fee waived per tenancy. Move-in Concierge: One call to set up utilities, cable, and internet. SmartLock Access & FREE Lockbox: Convenient move-in with advanced security. Online Rent Payments & Portal Access: Easy access to your payments and account overview. Vetted Vendor Program: Only insured vendors will service your unit for extra reliability. Take advantage of this comprehensive package for just $49.50/month, designed to enhance your living experience while saving you time and money! * Neighborhood Insight: To get a true sense of the area, we recommend visiting the property at different times of the day. This will give you a realistic feel for the neighborhood's ambiance and what to expect. * Maintenance: B2B Realty ensures that all properties are safe and well-maintained. While tenants are not permitted to make changes or repairs to the property, our dedicated maintenance team is always available to address any issues. Availability: * Self paying Accepted: We are pleased to accept a Self paying applicant 158077 SHOWMOJO LOVELY 1 1 $785-$800 8

Experience elevated living with an array of premier community amenities designed for comfort and style. Unwind at the resort-style pool with cabanas and elegant lounge areas, or energize your day in the state-of-the-art fitness studio featuring free weights, cardio equipment, and training stations. Enjoy outdoor gatherings at the beautifully landscaped barbecue and picnic spots. Our gated community offers secure access with both covered and surface parking for your convenience. Pet lovers will appreciate our welcoming, pet-friendly environment created with your furry companions in mind. Discover the perfect blend of luxury and leisure--contact our friendly leasing team today to schedule your private tour and find the home that truly fits your lifestyle. 158145 HARMLS LOVELY 2 2 $1099 8

Resort-Style Amenities: - Heated oceanfront pool - Beachside lounge chairs - Fishing pier - Beachfront restaurant - 24/7 security Approved for all short-term rental platforms including Airbnb, Booking, and VRBO. Unit boasts brand new kitchen, marble floors, spa tub, washer,dryer & tandem parking for two cars. Building offers fitness center, playroom, pool/beach service, TV room, doggie park, 24 hour concierge, valet parking and more. La Perla is located within short distance of fine restaurants, grocery stores, shopping and places of worship. STR-03175. 859 1740 Willow St unit 109 Faribault MN 55021
Find Your Perfect Home at Elmview I Apartments - Modern Living with Exceptional Comfort! Welcome to Elmview I Apartments, where contemporary design meets everyday convenience. Whether you're looking for a spacious 1, 2, or 3 bedroom home, our modern apartments are designed to elevate your lifestyle. Each Apartment Features: - Pet friendly & smoke free - Sleek stainless-steel appliances, in a spacious open-concept kitchen - In-unit washer and dryer - Expansive private deck - Elevator Community Amenities - State-of-the-art fitness center - Heated underground parking - no more scraping ice in winter! - Community room & rooftop terrace - perfect for entertaining - Controlled entry & security cameras for peace of mind Special Offers: First Month Free! Get your first month free when you sign a 12 or 24 month lease! Must meet application requirements to qualify. Refer a Neighbor! Know someone looking for a place? Refer them to us! If they sign a lease and move in, you could receive a $500 rent credit. Contact our office to learn how it works. Gas, water, sewer, snow, and trash removal INCLUDED in rent. Located in Rice County, and served by Faribault Public Schools. With 72 modern units, Elmview I offers everything you need and more. Call us now to book a tour! Disclaimer: Photos are for reference only and may not reflect the exact apartment. 158879 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $1295 8

Get your first month free when you sign a 12 or 24 month lease! Must meet application requirements to qualify. Refer a Neighbor! Know someone looking for a place? Refer them to us! If they sign a lease and move in, you could receive a $500 rent credit. Contact our office to learn how it works. Gas, water, sewer, snow, and trash removal INCLUDED in rent. Located in Rice County, and served by Faribault Public Schools. With 72 modern units, Elmview I offers everything you need and more. Call us now to book a tour! 867 1750 Sky Lark Ln unit # 1130 Houston TX 77056
This apartment is located in the Galleria/Uptown area of Houston TX 77056. Studio apartments start at $1734. One bedroom apartments start at $1874. Two bedroom apartments start at $3058. This property was built in 2014, and has 355 units. *This community is not authorized to accept housing vouchers. *No felony convictions in the last 10 years. *No evictions or broken leases. *No temporary housing. Must rent for 6 months or longer. *You must be employed and have verifiable income. The actual price of this rental is dependent on the day you need to move. The rent can change daily based on availability of the unit. We have placed sleek and modern ceiling fans throughout the apartment.The balcony and patio is a great way to spend time with friends or family. Having a space to sit and relax outside is important for your well being.Enjoy premium hardwood floors, ceramic tile, and upgraded carpet throughout.We have built vaulted ceilings to create a contemporary and generous living space. If you love an open floor plan and do not want to be boxed in, our floor to ceiling windows offers a panaramic view 24/7. Wake up to the sun rise and end the day with the sunset.Our comfortable apartments include air conditioning to keep your home at the forefront of temperature control.Enjoy a wood burning fireplace on chilly nights.Whether you are cooking up a batch of homemade pancakes or making a simple salad, our gourmet kitchens are equipped with all of the necessary tools to make your time in the kitchen a dream. Granite countertops, ample storage, and chef inspired islands keep everything closeby.The kitchen has custom cabinetry for a stylish finish.Each kitchen is equipped with a built in microwave.The dishwasher is energy efficient and high performance. It is the perfect appliance for quick clean up after cooking.The pantry is perfect to keep your food and beverages organized.You will find premium stainless steel or black appliances for an upscale living experience. Air Conditioning, Balcony, Built In Bookshelf, Ceiling Fan, Custom Cabinets, Designer Bathroom, Dishwasher, Fireplace, Floor to Ceiling Windows, Garden Tub, Gourmet Kitchen, High Ceilings, Microwave, Oversized Closets, Pantry, Premium Appliances, Premium Flooring, Standup Shower, Wheelchair Accessible, Yard, Dishwasher, Disposal, Stove, Microwave, Oven, Refrigerator Bathtub, Shower, Garden Tub Washer, Dryer 158903 LISTANZA LOVELY 1 1 $1874-$2025 8

Wake up to the sun rise and end the day with the sunset.Our comfortable apartments include air conditioning to keep your home at the forefront of temperature control.Enjoy a wood burning fireplace on chilly nights.Whether you are cooking up a batch of homemade pancakes or making a simple salad, our gourmet kitchens are equipped with all of the necessary tools to make your time in the kitchen a dream. Granite countertops, ample storage, and chef inspired islands keep everything closeby.The kitchen has custom cabinetry for a stylish finish.Each kitchen is equipped with a built in microwave.The dishwasher is energy efficient and high performance. It is the perfect appliance for quick clean up after cooking.The pantry is perfect to keep your food and beverages organized.You will find premium stainless steel or black appliances for an upscale living experience. Two bedroom apartment with two full bathrooms available upstairs. Unit has fridge, stove, and dishwasher. Water and trash paid for and monthly pest control! Rooms are equal size with walk in closets. Plenty of storage space available in the hallway and bathrooms. Pet friendly with one time fee, must be under 35lbs. Two laundry rooms, two pools, and basketball and tennis court! To Apply: We ask for two forms of identification and proof of income. 3x the monthly rent. Bad credit or no credit ok! Call or stop by for a tour 956-383-8382 1709 W Schunior St November Special: One Month Free Rent Just a few minutes away from UTRGV. Catch the shuttle directly across from us! UTRGV students receive between $270 (9 month lease) or $360(12 month lease) off their first month! 76590 BUILDIUM LOVELY 2 2 $825 8

891 1825 Oakview Ave SE unit 108 Alexandria MN 56308
BRAND NEW! Hillside Apartments Be among the first to experience exceptional living at Hillside Apartments -- Alexandria's newest apartment community designed with comfort, convenience, and community in mind. This is the first of several buildings coming to the Hillside development, with future phases underway. Whether you're looking for a studio or need multiple bedrooms, Hillside offers modern layouts and features to fit your lifestyle. Apartment Features - Pet friendly & smoke free - In-unit washer and dryer - Stainless steel appliances - Dishwasher - Heat and Air Conditioning - Walk-in closets in select floor plans - Kitchen islands in most layouts - ADA-accessible options available Available Floor Plans - Studio - Alcove - 1 Bed / 1 Bath - 1 Bed / 1 Bath ADA - 2 Bed / 2 Bath - 3 Bed / 2 Bath - 4 Bed / 2 Bath Community Amenities - Fitness center - Community room - Coffee bar - Elevator - Heated underground parking - Bicycle rack - Dog wash station - Secure entry with security cameras - Storage units Future Plans for Community Amenities As part of the growing Hillside development, residents will enjoy access to an expanding list of shared community amenities as future buildings are completed: - Dog park - Indoor & outdoor pickleball courts - Outdoor pool & splash pad - Theatre - Golf simulator - Sauna & hot tub - Outdoor playground - Grill stations & picnic areas Special Offer: Security deposit waived for qualified applicants! Additional Details - 6, 12, and 24-month lease options available - Utilities included: water, sewer, trash, and snow/lawn removal - $60/month utility fee includes internet Located in Alexandria, MN, Hillside Apartments brings a new level of modern, connected living to the area. Reach out today to learn more! Disclaimer: Photos are for reference only and may not reflect the exact apartment. 159129 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $1295 8

Additional Details - 6, 12, and 24-month lease options available - Utilities included: water, sewer, trash, and snow/lawn removal - $60/month utility fee includes internet Located in Alexandria, MN, Hillside Apartments brings a new level of modern, connected living to the area. Reach out today to learn more! Disclaimer: Photos are for reference only and may not reflect the exact apartment. 159129 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $1295 8

924 2350 NE 135th St #1010 North Miami FL 33181
Priced to rent. Don't miss this opportunity. Amazing canal and intracoastal views. Beautifu unit. Spacious. 2 bedroom and 2 full baths. I can't recommend this location enough. It's wonderful to be close to schools and shopping! And the added perk of watching the boats from my balcony? Talk about the perfect life! 927 2350 NE 135th St #804 North Miami FL 33181
Gorgeous 2 bed/ 2 bath unit for rent located in the Keystone area. Unit has breathtaking views of the canal, bay area, Bal Harbour, and Miami Skyline. Freshly painted, spacious layout, equipped stainless steel appliances and 2 assigned parking spaces. Centrally located between the MIA and FLL airports. Minutes away to the famous Bal Harbour shops, Aventura mall, and beaches. Walking distance to several shops and restaurants. 11078 RentPath LISTHUB 2 2 $2200 8

939 2520 W McLellan Blvd unit 24 Phoenix AZ 85017
Welcome to our spacious apartments! We offer a variety of large 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments to suit your needs. The best part? Our community boasts a range of amenities to enhance your living experience. Take advantage of our playground, perfect for outdoor fun and entertainment. Enjoy a delicious barbecue with friends and family at our BBQ area. For your convenience, we have on-site laundry facilities, ensuring that you never have to worry about finding a laundromat. Our dedicated property manager and maintenance team are always available to address any concerns or requests you may have. Our apartments offer easy access to a variety of dining, shopping, and entertainment options. Whether you're looking for a cozy one-bedroom or a spacious three-bedroom apartment, our community has the perfect home for you. Don't miss out on this opportunity to live in a comfortable and convenient apartment. Contact us today to schedule a tour. *Please be advised that advertised pricing is the starting price for the unit. Rental pricing may increase based on your income. Pricing for your apartment is based on your income.* 161072 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 2 1 $1254 8

947 2901 Boston Ave unit D-12 Des Moines IA 50310
Welcome to Clover Creek! Experience contemporary comfort and convenience in our serene neighborhood at Clover Creek Our pet-friendly community provides a variety of spacious Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom units tailored to suit your lifestyle. Apartment Features & Amenities: - Enjoy the luxury of private patios or balconies (availability varies by floor). - Benefit from complimentary parking for your convenience. - Garages are also available for added convenience! - We're a pet-friendly community, welcoming up to 2 pets per unit with a one-time non-refundable pet fee plus a monthly pet rent of per pet. Screening Criteria: - Ensure that your household gross monthly income is 2.5 times the base rent. - Maintain a minimum credit score of 525. - No collections (excluding student loans and medical payments). - Uphold a clean criminal history and rental record. - Provide a valid US ID or SSN, or have a cosigner with a valid US ID or SSN. Utility Policies: - Common area utilities (electric, water, sewer, and trash) are arranged by the landlord. Apply today and immerse yourself in the perfect blend of modern living and tranquility at Clover Creek. Your new home is waiting! *Income Restricted 161682 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 0 1 $611 8

955 301 Walkertown Ave unit 102S Winston-Salem NC 27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem. 161941 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 2 1 $950 8

979 327 Pine St #3014 Pawtucket RI 2860
Experience upscale living in these newly constructed (2025) luxury apartments, ideally located just steps from the new Pawtucket-Central Falls Train Station and minutes from Centreville Bank Stadium's concerts, sports, shopping, and dining. Spacious 1-bedroom units start at $1,600/month, offering open-concept layouts with luxury vinyl plank flooring and high-efficiency electric utilities. Each apartment provides modern comfort and convenience with secure key fob entry, on-site gym, on-site laundry, and private parking. Residents can unwind in the beautiful outdoor courtyard, designed for community connection and relaxation. 162452 RentPath LISTHUB 1 1 $1600 8
980 327 Pine St unit 2014 Pawtucket RI 2860
Welcome to Pine St Apartments in Pawtucket, RI! Our community offers a variety of amenities to enhance your living experience. Take your furry friend to our on-site dog park for some playtime, or break a sweat in our state-of-the-art gym. Our location near the train station and makes commuting a breeze. Relax in our peaceful courtyard or get some work done in our designated work station. Rest easy knowing your vehicle is secure in our gated lot, and easily access your apartment with the convenience of an elevator. Experience comfort and convenience at Pine St Apartments. 162452 APPFOLIO_FREE LOVELY 1 1 $1600 8

987 3328 Cedarplaza Ln unit 102 Dallas TX 75235
Step into style at The Trousdale! Our 1 bedroom, 1 bath is now going for $1,299 and comes with a washer and dryer included--no extra hassle, no extra cost. Cool off at our iconic T-shaped pool, break a sweat in the 24-hour fitness center, and bring your furry friend along--our onsite dog park is the perfect hangout for pups. Located in the heart of Oak Lawn, you'll be surrounded by Dallas' trendiest restaurants, vibrant nightlife, and premier shopping. Enjoy 8 weeks free on an 18-month lease, plus furnished options available to make your move even easier. Come see why The Trousdale is the perfect mix of comfort, convenience, and style! 162546 TURBOTENANT LOVELY 1 1 $1299 8
